use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF THROMBOCYTOPENIA IN ADULT PATIENTS WITH CHRONIC IMMUNE THROMBOCYTOPENIA (ITP) WHO HAVE HAD AN INSUFFICIENT RESPONSE TO A PREVIOUS TREATMENT

indications.text:
TAVALISSE is indicated for the treatment of thrombocytopenia in adult patients with chronic immune
thrombocytopenia (ITP) who have had an insufficient response to a previous treatment.

TAVALISSE is indicated for the treatment of thrombocytopenia in adult patients with chronic immune
thrombocytopenia (ITP) who have had an insufficient response to a previous treatment.
